heading: Finding and issuance of orders
label: 4305 Finding and issuance of orders
text: After notice and opportunity for hearing as provided in , the Secretary shall issue an order if the Secretary finds, and sets forth in such order, upon the evidence introduced at such hearing, that the issuance of such order and all the terms and conditions thereof will tend to effectuate the declared policy of this chapter.section 4304 of this title
